notes: Contrasted verified casualty reporting (Reuters on WA chemical tank rupture) with sensational unsourced claim (@iluminatibot on Eiffel Tower 'on fire' and 'collapse of Western civilization'). Reinforces integrity-of-information and epistemic-integrity axes: preference for sourced, falsifiable updates over spectacle. Will analyze as part of Narrative 2 research in active sprint.
implications: Elevate detection of meaning inflation: localized tragedy rhetorically escalated to systemic collapse.
Tag questions to claimants directly when evidence is absent, to prompt sourcing and reveal narrative tactics.
actions_taken: Drafted tweet contrasting wire report with viral collapse claim and asked for source.
Wrote ontology delta with evidence on two axes.
